headline: Aptiv (APTV) Soon-to-Spinoff Subsidiary Prices $1.6B Debt Offering
summary: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) is among the 10 most undervalued stocks to buy and hold for 10 years. On March 4, Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) announced that subsidiaries of its Electrical Distribution Systems segment priced a private offering of $1.6 billion in senior notes, consisting of $800 million in 6.125% senior notes due 2031 and $800 million in […]
